# url-paste

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Paste a URL into an empty text block to turn it into a bookmark or embed.
- Web:
  - Uses: `page/editor.registerBlockTextExtension`, `primitives/row.Row`, `primitives/surface.Surface`, `primitives/viewport-overlay.ViewportOverlay`
